# <zbk-heading>

Base class: `.zbk-heading`. Variant classes: `.zbk-heading--{variant}`. Tokens: `--zbk-heading-{property}[-{state}]`. Write `aria-*`/`role` on the element; they relocate to the internal native element. `focus()` forwards to the internal focusable.

## Attributes

| Attribute | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `level` | `number` | `1` |  |
| `anchor` | `boolean` | `false` |  |
| `copy-link` | `boolean` | `false` |  |

## Events

No custom events. Native events (`click`, `change`, `input`, ...) bubble from the internal native element in light DOM — listen on the zebkit element.

## Variants

No shipped variants.
